# Adbnik v1.1.1

## Highlights

- **User guide** on GitHub Pages: **[https://nvnkennedy.github.io/adbnik/guide/](https://nvnkennedy.github.io/adbnik/guide/)**
  - **Terminal** — main menu (File, Session, Commands, View), device bar, sidebar (CMD, PowerShell, Login, bookmarks), tab strip actions, keyboard shortcuts.
  - **File Explorer** — local and remote panes, every toolbar action, middle-column push/pull, F2/F5/Delete/Backspace behavior.
  - **Screen Control** — numbered steps to start/stop scrcpy; bit rate, max size, FPS, audio, fullscreen, embed mode, recording, extra CLI; ADB helper buttons.

- **README & PyPI:** README includes a **User guide** section and Resources row; PyPI **Documentation** project URL points to the guide.

## Install

```bat
py -m pip install --upgrade adbnik==1.1.1
```

**Changelog:** [CHANGELOG.md — 1.1.1](https://github.com/nvnkennedy/adbnik/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md)
